---
title: "Research Tracker"
subtitle: "Shujie Xu · Applied Micro & Corporate Finance"
toc: true
toc-location: left
toc-title: "Weeks"
toc-depth: 1
page-layout: full
include-in-header:
  text: |
    <meta property="og:title" content="Research Tracker · Shujie Xu">
    <meta property="og:description" content="26 papers tracked · 23 NBER · 3 weeks · Updated Mar 2, 2026">
    <meta property="og:image" content="https://shujie-xu.github.io/paper-tracker/preview.png">
    <meta property="og:image:width" content="1200">
    <meta property="og:image:height" content="630">
    <meta property="og:type" content="website">
    <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
    <meta name="twitter:image" content="https://shujie-xu.github.io/paper-tracker/preview.png">
---

```{=html}
<style>
body { font-family: "Inter", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; }
h1,h2,h3,h4,h5 { font-family: "Georgia", "Times New Roman", serif; }
a { color: #2c6fad; }

/* Stats bar */
.tracker-stats { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:1.25rem; padding:0.75rem 1rem;
  background:#f8f9fa; border-radius:6px; margin-bottom:1.25rem; font-size:0.85rem; color:#495057; }
.tracker-stats strong { color:#212529; }

/* Filter bar */
.filter-bar { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.4rem; margin-bottom:1.5rem; align-items:center; }
.filter-label { font-size:0.78rem; color:#6c757d; font-style:italic; margin-right:0.25rem; }
.filter-btn { font-size:0.78rem; padding:0.2rem 0.65rem; border-radius:20px;
  border:1px solid #dee2e6; background:white; color:#495057; cursor:pointer; transition:all .15s; }
.filter-btn:hover, .filter-btn.active { background:#2c6fad; border-color:#2c6fad; color:white; }

/* Paper card */
.paper-card { border:1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius:8px; padding:1rem 1.2rem;
  margin-bottom:0.85rem; background:white; transition:box-shadow .15s, border-color .15s; }
.paper-card:hover { box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.08); border-color:#adb5bd; }
.paper-card.top-pick { border-left:4px solid #d4380d; }
.paper-card.high-relevance { border-left:4px solid #fa8c16; }
.paper-card.hidden { display:none !important; }

.paper-title { font-size:0.96rem; font-weight:600; font-family:Georgia,serif;
  margin-bottom:0.3rem; line-height:1.4; }
.paper-title a { color:inherit; text-decoration:none; }
.paper-title a:hover { color:#2c6fad; text-decoration:underline; }

.paper-meta { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.35rem; align-items:center;
  margin-bottom:0.4rem; font-size:0.78rem; }
.paper-authors { font-size:0.8rem; color:#6c757d; font-style:italic; margin-bottom:0.35rem; }

/* Badges */
.score-badge { font-weight:700; padding:0.1rem 0.4rem; border-radius:4px; font-size:0.75rem; }
.score-top    { background:#fff1f0; color:#d4380d; }
.score-high   { background:#fff7e6; color:#d46b08; }
.score-mid    { background:#f6ffed; color:#389e0d; }
.score-low    { background:#f5f5f5; color:#595959; }
.topic-tag  { font-size:0.72rem; padding:0.1rem 0.45rem; border-radius:20px;
  background:#e8f4fd; color:#2c6fad; }
.source-tag { font-size:0.72rem; padding:0.1rem 0.45rem; border-radius:20px;
  background:#f0f0f0; color:#595959; }

/* Analysis (detail pages) */
.analysis-block { margin-top:0.75rem; padding-top:0.75rem;
  border-top:1px solid #e9ecef; font-size:0.83rem; }
.analysis-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:0.5rem 1.2rem; margin-bottom:0.5rem; }
.analysis-item label { display:block; font-size:0.72rem; font-weight:600;
  text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.04em; color:#6c757d; margin-bottom:.15rem; }
.analysis-item p { color:#212529; margin:0; }
.takeaway-box { background:#fff8e6; border-left:3px solid #fa8c16;
  border-radius:0 4px 4px 0; padding:0.5rem 0.75rem; color:#333; }
.takeaway-box strong { color:#d46b08; }

@media(max-width:768px) { .analysis-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; } }
</style>
<div class="tracker-stats">
  <span class="stat-item">📄 <strong>26</strong> papers tracked</span>
  <span class="stat-item">📅 <strong>3</strong> weeks</span>
  <span class="stat-item">🏛 <strong>23</strong> NBER</span>
  <span class="stat-item">📑 <strong>3</strong> SSRN</span>
  <span class="stat-item">🎯 <strong>9</strong> AI-scored</span>
  <span class="stat-item">⭐ <strong>4</strong> full reads</span>
  <span class="stat-item" style="margin-left:auto; color:#adb5bd; font-size:0.8rem;">Updated Mar 2, 2026</span>
</div>

<div class="filter-bar" id="filterBar">
  <span class="filter-label">Filter:</span>
  <button class="filter-btn active" onclick="filterCards('all',this)">All</button>
  <button class="filter-btn" onclick="filterCards('full_read',this)">⭐ Full analysis</button>
  <button class="filter-btn" onclick="filterCards('NBER',this)">NBER</button>
  <button class="filter-btn" onclick="filterCards('SSRN',this)">SSRN</button>
  <button class="filter-btn" onclick="filterCards('information',this)">Information</button>
  <button class="filter-btn" onclick="filterCards('corporate-political',this)">Corp. Political</button>
  <button class="filter-btn" onclick="filterCards('text-methods',this)">Text Methods</button>
  <button class="filter-btn" onclick="filterCards('supply-chain',this)">Supply Chain</button>
</div>
```

## Week 10 · Mar 2–8, 2026 {#2026-w10}

```{=html}
<div class="paper-card" data-score="1.5" data-source="NBER" data-topics="information,corporate-political">
  <div class="paper-title">
    <a href="papers/nber-w34909.html">Multidimensional Signaling and the Rise of Cultural Politics</a>
  </div>
  <div class="paper-meta">
    <span class="score-badge score-low">1.5</span>
    <span class="source-tag">NBER</span>
    <span class="topic-tag" data-topic="information">Information Econ</span><span class="topic-tag" data-topic="corporate-political">Corp. Political</span>
    <span class="source-tag" style="background:#f6ffed; color:#389e0d;">⭐ Full analysis</span>
  </div>
  <div class="paper-authors">Daron Acemoglu, Georgy Egorov, Konstantin Sonin</div>
</div>
```

## Week 9 · Feb 23–1, 2026 {#2026-w09}

```{=html}
<div class="paper-card top-pick" data-score="8.5" data-source="NBER" data-topics="information">
  <div class="paper-title">
    <a href="papers/nber-w34807.html">AI, Opinion Ecosystems, and Finance</a>
  </div>
  <div class="paper-meta">
    <span class="score-badge score-top">8.5</span>
    <span class="source-tag">NBER</span>
    <span class="topic-tag" data-topic="information">Information Econ</span>
    <span class="source-tag" style="background:#f6ffed; color:#389e0d;">⭐ Full analysis</span>
  </div>
  <div class="paper-authors">David Hirshleifer, Lin Peng, Qiguang Wang et al.</div>
</div>
<div class="paper-card high-relevance" data-score="7.2" data-source="NBER" data-topics="information,corporate-finance">
  <div class="paper-title">
    <a href="papers/nber-w34882.html">Intangible Intensity</a>
  </div>
  <div class="paper-meta">
    <span class="score-badge score-high">7.2</span>
    <span class="source-tag">NBER</span>
    <span class="topic-tag" data-topic="information">Information Econ</span><span class="topic-tag" data-topic="corporate-finance">Corp. Finance</span>
    
  </div>
  <div class="paper-authors">Andrea L. Eisfeldt, Barney Hartman-Glaser, Edward T. Kim et al.</div>
</div>
<div class="paper-card" data-score="6.8" data-source="NBER" data-topics="">
  <div class="paper-title">
    <a href="papers/nber-w34859.html">Chaining Tasks, Redefining Work: A Theory of AI Automation</a>
  </div>
  <div class="paper-meta">
    <span class="score-badge score-mid">6.8</span>
    <span class="source-tag">NBER</span>
    
    
  </div>
  <div class="paper-authors">Mert Demirer, John J. Horton, Nicole Immorlica et al.</div>
</div>
<div class="paper-card" data-score="6.8" data-source="NBER" data-topics="text-methods">
  <div class="paper-title">
    <a href="papers/nber-w34861.html">Machine Learning Meets Markowitz</a>
  </div>
  <div class="paper-meta">
    <span class="score-badge score-mid">6.8</span>
    <span class="source-tag">NBER</span>
    <span class="topic-tag" data-topic="text-methods">Text Methods</span>
    
  </div>
  <div class="paper-authors">Yijie Wang, Hao Gao, Campbell R. Harvey et al.</div>
</div>
<div class="paper-card" data-score="6.8" data-source="NBER" data-topics="">
  <div class="paper-title">
    <a href="papers/nber-w34873.html">Public Finance in the Age of AI: A Primer</a>
  </div>
  <div class="paper-meta">
    <span class="score-badge score-mid">6.8</span>
    <span class="source-tag">NBER</span>
    
    
  </div>
  <div class="paper-authors">Anton Korinek, Lee Lockwood</div>
</div>
<div class="paper-card" data-score="6.8" data-source="NBER" data-topics="">
  <div class="paper-title">
    <a href="papers/nber-w34851.html">Does Generative AI Narrow Education-Based Productivity Gaps? Evidence from a Randomized Experiment</a>
  </div>
  <div class="paper-meta">
    <span class="score-badge score-mid">6.8</span>
    <span class="source-tag">NBER</span>
    
    
  </div>
  <div class="paper-authors">Guillermo Cruces, Diego Fernández Meijide, Sebastian Galiani et al.</div>
</div>
<div class="paper-card" data-score="6.8" data-source="NBER" data-topics="corporate-finance">
  <div class="paper-title">
    <a href="papers/nber-w34836.html">Firm Data on AI</a>
  </div>
  <div class="paper-meta">
    <span class="score-badge score-mid">6.8</span>
    <span class="source-tag">NBER</span>
    <span class="topic-tag" data-topic="corporate-finance">Corp. Finance</span>
    
  </div>
  <div class="paper-authors">Ivan Yotzov, Jose Maria Barrero, Nicholas Bloom et al.</div>
</div>
<div class="paper-card" data-score="6.8" data-source="NBER" data-topics="corporate-political">
  <div class="paper-title">
    <a href="papers/nber-w34813.html">The Politics of AI</a>
  </div>
  <div class="paper-meta">
    <span class="score-badge score-mid">6.8</span>
    <span class="source-tag">NBER</span>
    <span class="topic-tag" data-topic="corporate-political">Corp. Political</span>
    
  </div>
  <div class="paper-authors">Nicholas Bloom, Christos Makridis</div>
</div>
<div class="paper-card" data-score="6.8" data-source="NBER" data-topics="">
  <div class="paper-title">
    <a href="papers/nber-w34808.html">AI Personality Extraction from Faces: Labor Market Implications</a>
  </div>
  <div class="paper-meta">
    <span class="score-badge score-mid">6.8</span>
    <span class="source-tag">NBER</span>
    
    
  </div>
  <div class="paper-authors">Marius Guenzel, Shimon Kogan, Marina Niessner et al.</div>
</div>
<div class="paper-card" data-score="1.5" data-source="NBER" data-topics="information,causal-inference">
  <div class="paper-title">
    <a href="https://www.nber.org/papers/w34875" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Household Responses to Private Risk Information</a>
  </div>
  <div class="paper-meta">
    <span class="score-badge score-low">1.5</span>
    <span class="source-tag">NBER</span>
    <span class="topic-tag" data-topic="information">Information Econ</span><span class="topic-tag" data-topic="causal-inference">Causal Inference</span>
    
  </div>
  <div class="paper-authors">Benjamin Krebs, Matthew J. Neidell</div>
</div>
<div class="paper-card" data-score="1.5" data-source="NBER" data-topics="information,corporate-finance">
  <div class="paper-title">
    <a href="https://www.nber.org/papers/w34827" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Threshold Disclosure in Collective Decisions</a>
  </div>
  <div class="paper-meta">
    <span class="score-badge score-low">1.5</span>
    <span class="source-tag">NBER</span>
    <span class="topic-tag" data-topic="information">Information Econ</span><span class="topic-tag" data-topic="corporate-finance">Corp. Finance</span>
    
  </div>
  <div class="paper-authors">Luca Braghieri, Leonardo Bursztyn, Jan Fasnacht</div>
</div>
<div class="paper-card" data-score="1.5" data-source="NBER" data-topics="corporate-finance,information">
  <div class="paper-title">
    <a href="https://www.nber.org/papers/w34846" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Bidder Pools in Mergers and Acquisitions</a>
  </div>
  <div class="paper-meta">
    <span class="score-badge score-low">1.5</span>
    <span class="source-tag">NBER</span>
    <span class="topic-tag" data-topic="corporate-finance">Corp. Finance</span><span class="topic-tag" data-topic="information">Information Econ</span>
    
  </div>
  <div class="paper-authors">Bruce I. Carlin, Tingting Liu, Micah S. Officer et al.</div>
</div>
<div class="paper-card" data-score="1.5" data-source="NBER" data-topics="text-methods,corporate-finance">
  <div class="paper-title">
    <a href="https://www.nber.org/papers/w34849" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Mimicking Finance</a>
  </div>
  <div class="paper-meta">
    <span class="score-badge score-low">1.5</span>
    <span class="source-tag">NBER</span>
    <span class="topic-tag" data-topic="text-methods">Text Methods</span><span class="topic-tag" data-topic="corporate-finance">Corp. Finance</span>
    
  </div>
  <div class="paper-authors">Lauren Cohen, Yiwen Lu, Quoc H. Nguyen</div>
</div>
<div class="paper-card" data-score="1.5" data-source="NBER" data-topics="information,housing,causal-inference">
  <div class="paper-title">
    <a href="papers/nber-w34815.html">Screen More, Sell Later: Screening and Dynamic Signaling in the Mortgage Market</a>
  </div>
  <div class="paper-meta">
    <span class="score-badge score-low">1.5</span>
    <span class="source-tag">NBER</span>
    <span class="topic-tag" data-topic="information">Information Econ</span><span class="topic-tag" data-topic="housing">housing</span><span class="topic-tag" data-topic="causal-inference">Causal Inference</span>
    <span class="source-tag" style="background:#f6ffed; color:#389e0d;">⭐ Full analysis</span>
  </div>
  <div class="paper-authors">Manuel Adelino, Bin Wei, Feng Zhao</div>
</div>
<div class="paper-card" data-score="0" data-source="NBER" data-topics="causal-inference">
  <div class="paper-title">
    <a href="https://www.nber.org/papers/w34842" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Nonparametric Identification of Demand without Exogenous Product Characteristics</a>
  </div>
  <div class="paper-meta">
    <span class="score-badge score-low">0.0</span>
    <span class="source-tag">NBER</span>
    <span class="topic-tag" data-topic="causal-inference">Causal Inference</span>
    
  </div>
  <div class="paper-authors">Kirill Borusyak, Jiafeng Chen, Peter Hull et al.</div>
</div>
<div class="paper-card" data-score="0" data-source="NBER" data-topics="corporate-finance,information">
  <div class="paper-title">
    <a href="https://www.nber.org/papers/w34868" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Venture Fraud</a>
  </div>
  <div class="paper-meta">
    <span class="score-badge score-low">0.0</span>
    <span class="source-tag">NBER</span>
    <span class="topic-tag" data-topic="corporate-finance">Corp. Finance</span><span class="topic-tag" data-topic="information">Information Econ</span>
    
  </div>
  <div class="paper-authors">Alexander Dyck, Freda Fang, Camille Hebert et al.</div>
</div>
<div class="paper-card" data-score="0" data-source="NBER" data-topics="corporate-finance,information">
  <div class="paper-title">
    <a href="https://www.nber.org/papers/w34870" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Why Do Firms Pay Different Interest Rates on Their Bank Loans?</a>
  </div>
  <div class="paper-meta">
    <span class="score-badge score-low">0.0</span>
    <span class="source-tag">NBER</span>
    <span class="topic-tag" data-topic="corporate-finance">Corp. Finance</span><span class="topic-tag" data-topic="information">Information Econ</span>
    
  </div>
  <div class="paper-authors">Mary Amiti, Anil K Kashyap, Anna Kovner et al.</div>
</div>
<div class="paper-card" data-score="0" data-source="NBER" data-topics="housing">
  <div class="paper-title">
    <a href="https://www.nber.org/papers/w34876" target="_blank" rel="noopener">A Unified Urban Model With Non-Homothetic Housing Demand</a>
  </div>
  <div class="paper-meta">
    <span class="score-badge score-low">0.0</span>
    <span class="source-tag">NBER</span>
    <span class="topic-tag" data-topic="housing">housing</span>
    
  </div>
  <div class="paper-authors">Frédéric Robert-Nicoud, Pierre-Philippe Combes, Gilles Duranton et al.</div>
</div>
<div class="paper-card" data-score="0" data-source="NBER" data-topics="information,corporate-finance">
  <div class="paper-title">
    <a href="https://www.nber.org/papers/w34889" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Optimal Simple Ratings</a>
  </div>
  <div class="paper-meta">
    <span class="score-badge score-low">0.0</span>
    <span class="source-tag">NBER</span>
    <span class="topic-tag" data-topic="information">Information Econ</span><span class="topic-tag" data-topic="corporate-finance">Corp. Finance</span>
    
  </div>
  <div class="paper-authors">Hugo Hopenhayn, Maryam Saeedi</div>
</div>
<div class="paper-card" data-score="0" data-source="NBER" data-topics="text-methods,corporate-political">
  <div class="paper-title">
    <a href="papers/nber-w34834.html">GPT as a Measurement Tool</a>
  </div>
  <div class="paper-meta">
    <span class="score-badge score-low">0.0</span>
    <span class="source-tag">NBER</span>
    <span class="topic-tag" data-topic="text-methods">Text Methods</span><span class="topic-tag" data-topic="corporate-political">Corp. Political</span>
    <span class="source-tag" style="background:#f6ffed; color:#389e0d;">⭐ Full analysis</span>
  </div>
  <div class="paper-authors">Hemanth Asirvatham, Elliott Mokski, Andrei Shleifer</div>
</div>
<div class="paper-card" data-score="0" data-source="NBER" data-topics="housing,causal-inference">
  <div class="paper-title">
    <a href="https://www.nber.org/papers/w34824" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Interest Rate Pass-Through With Adjustable Rate Mortgages</a>
  </div>
  <div class="paper-meta">
    <span class="score-badge score-low">0.0</span>
    <span class="source-tag">NBER</span>
    <span class="topic-tag" data-topic="housing">housing</span><span class="topic-tag" data-topic="causal-inference">Causal Inference</span>
    
  </div>
  <div class="paper-authors">Manuel Adelino, Miguel A. Ferreira, Sujiao Zhao</div>
</div>
<div class="paper-card" data-score="0" data-source="NBER" data-topics="causal-inference">
  <div class="paper-title">
    <a href="https://www.nber.org/papers/w34796" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Clustered Network Connectedness: A New Measurement Framework, with Application to Global Equity Markets</a>
  </div>
  <div class="paper-meta">
    <span class="score-badge score-low">0.0</span>
    <span class="source-tag">NBER</span>
    <span class="topic-tag" data-topic="causal-inference">Causal Inference</span>
    
  </div>
  <div class="paper-authors">Bastien Buchwalter, Francis X. Diebold, Kamil Yilmaz</div>
</div>
```

## Week 1 · Dec 29–4, 2026 {#2026-w01}

```{=html}
<div class="paper-card" data-score="0" data-source="SSRN" data-topics="corporate-political,text-methods">
  <div class="paper-title">
    <a href="https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=5191573" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Comments that Count: Corporate Influence in SEC Governance Rulemaking</a>
  </div>
  <div class="paper-meta">
    <span class="score-badge score-low">0.0</span>
    <span class="source-tag">SSRN</span>
    <span class="topic-tag" data-topic="corporate-political">Corp. Political</span><span class="topic-tag" data-topic="text-methods">Text Methods</span>
    
  </div>
  <div class="paper-authors">Qianzhou Du, Jiekun Huang, Pengfei Ye et al.</div>
</div>
<div class="paper-card" data-score="0" data-source="SSRN" data-topics="text-methods,corporate-political">
  <div class="paper-title">
    <a href="https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=5024250" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Economic Surveillance Using Corporate Text</a>
  </div>
  <div class="paper-meta">
    <span class="score-badge score-low">0.0</span>
    <span class="source-tag">SSRN</span>
    <span class="topic-tag" data-topic="text-methods">Text Methods</span><span class="topic-tag" data-topic="corporate-political">Corp. Political</span>
    
  </div>
  <div class="paper-authors">Tarek A. Hassan, Stephan Hollander, Aakash Kalyani et al.</div>
</div>
<div class="paper-card" data-score="0" data-source="SSRN" data-topics="corporate-political">
  <div class="paper-title">
    <a href="https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=5006884" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Lobbying Congress versus Agencies</a>
  </div>
  <div class="paper-meta">
    <span class="score-badge score-low">0.0</span>
    <span class="source-tag">SSRN</span>
    <span class="topic-tag" data-topic="corporate-political">Corp. Political</span>
    
  </div>
  <div class="paper-authors">Michelle Lowry, Ekaterina Volkova</div>
</div>
```


```{=html}
<script>
function filterCards(filter, btn) {
  document.querySelectorAll('#filterBar .filter-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  if (btn) btn.classList.add('active');
  document.querySelectorAll('.paper-card').forEach(card => {
    let show = false;
    if (filter === 'all') {
      show = true;
    } else if (filter === 'full_read') {
      show = card.querySelector('.source-tag[style*="f6ffed"]') !== null;
    } else if (filter === 'NBER' || filter === 'SSRN') {
      show = card.dataset.source === filter;
    } else {
      show = (card.dataset.topics || '').split(',').includes(filter);
    }
    card.classList.toggle('hidden', !show);
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('h2').forEach(h2 => {
    const section = h2.closest('section') || h2.parentElement;
    if (!section) return;
    const visible = [...section.querySelectorAll('.paper-card')].some(c => !c.classList.contains('hidden'));
    h2.style.display = visible ? '' : 'none';
  });
}
</script>
```
